message:
feat(storage): tick 148 action-undo cluster cx-first siblings (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Twenty-seventh sibling-expansion tick. Adds 2 new storage `_with_cx`
siblings for the action-undo cluster.

New siblings:
- upsert_action_undo_with_cx (write path)
- upsert_action_undo_redacted_with_cx (composite — applies
  Redactor::redact_fields then routes the insert through
  upsert_action_undo_with_cx so the full composite honours
  cancellation)

Each leaf sibling does a pre-flight `cx.checkpoint()?` then delegates.
The redacted composite cx-threads its internal insert.

Test: `storage_tick148_action_undo_cluster_roundtrip` seeds pane +
two audit actions for FK, writes an undo row via the plain
`_with_cx` path (asserts undoable/strategy/hint roundtrip), then
writes a second row via the redacted composite (expected value
computed by running `redact_fields` on a clone of the input, so
the assertion holds whether or not the Redactor's default
configuration transforms the particular inputs). Verified via fork
bypass: 495/495 storage:: tests pass.

Storage cx-first coverage: 128 + 2 = 130 siblings across 140 legacy
pub async fns. 10 legacy methods still lack a sibling — all in
the search/semantic cluster (search, search_with_options,
search_with_results, store_embedding, get_unembedded_segments,
get_embedding, embedding_stats, store_embedding_f32, semantic_search,
hybrid_search_with_results).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
